title: Twisted Treats
description: Visit the old civilization of pumpkins and discover their magic and inventions.
body:
![TwistedTreats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11db647df2540b8af60e8661bf1eec182eb1b7d2.png)

Dive into the eerie world of Twisted Treats, where an ancient, pumpkin-worshiping civilization once thrived. This forgotten society harnessed mystical pumpkin-based magic, crafting a grand temple of pumpkin carvings, vine-laden halls, and enchanted lanterns. However, their story took a dark turn when a vengeful spirit tore through their ranks, leaving the place desolate and haunted.

Now, players can explore the abandoned structure filled with remnants of magical rituals, cursed pumpkin artifacts, and haunted chambers. But beware—this vengeful ghost still roams, defending the secrets of the Twisted Treats civilization. Collect powerful relics, unravel the pumpkin magic, and confront the supernatural forces that guard the ruins.


![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c1c5de5660a3ba9a74333983aa65a2e73f449eb.png)
